title: centaurea affinis subsp. pallidior
intro: Centaurea affinis subsp. pallidior, also known as the Pallid Centaury, is a rare plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurea affinis subsp. pallidior include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other infections.
